headline: Global Cloud ELN Service Market | USA, China, India Lead | Thermo Fisher Scientific, Agilent Technologies, Dassault Systèmes Drive Digital Lab Transformation
summary: According to the latest analysis by Future Market Insights, the global Cloud Electronic Laboratory Notebook (ELN) Service market is entering a strong growth phase, driven by accelerating digital transformation in research environments, rising regulatory compliance requirements, and increasing demand for collaborative, cloud-based data management. Valued at USD 375.1 million in 2025, the market is projected to reach USD 1,156.0 million by 2035, expanding at a CAGR of 12.6%.

headline: Labcorp Launches FDA-Approved Companion Diagnostic to Identify Patients with Ovarian Cancer Eligible for KEYTRUDA®
